message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a significant breach of trust by embezzling funds while in a fiduciary role. However, considering the defendant has no prior criminal record and has demonstrated remorse by making partial restitution, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and acknowledge the severity of the offense, which will be followed by probation to ensure full restitution is paid.","verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a significant breach of trust by embezzling funds while in a fiduciary role. However, considering the defendant has no prior criminal record and has demonstrated remorse by making partial restitution, a lengthy prison sentence is unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and acknowledge the severity of the offense, which will be followed by probation to ensure full restitution is paid.
